title: MUSIC Evangelion Sheet music
wikitext:
[]: [MUSIC] Evangelion Sheet music             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Sun Aug 13, 2006 10:42 pm Would i be out of place to ask for Evangelion Sheet music? I'm mainly looking for clarinet pieces, but clarinet duets, trios are fine If this violates ToS, im sorry.

[]:             Quote Post by aCynicalPie » Mon Aug 14, 2006 12:25 am Ichigo's has an excellent site. Most of her Evangelion transcriptions are arranged for piano, but as long as you can read treble clef you're probably good.

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Mon Aug 14, 2006 3:07 am Think they have the tabs for a seven string Schecter? Would love to play some tunes.

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Mon Aug 14, 2006 7:26 am yea, i saw that site, but eh, i cant read/transpose at the same time and im too lazy to rewrite to Bb hmm...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Aug 14, 2006 8:14 am I've leeched some sheet music over the years. Here's what I have: http://www.evamonkey.com/sheet_music/ Enjoy!

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Mon Aug 14, 2006 11:01 pm does a clarinet part even exsist? If i do feel like transposing this, ill need like 4-5 friends to play too to make the sound decent And im the only musician i know that like NGE... Dang... Thank tho Eva Monkey, nice collection

[]: Rei music...             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Mar 25, 2009 6:13 am im sure theres sheet music out there...but in case any of you music makers ain't got it... Rei in the key of C Major http://img186.imageshack.us/img186/3070/reimusic.jpg i nabbed a midi of it from the net and fumbled around in finale (finale = photoshop for music) and viola... its a pretty simplistic version...it was hard to pick a good key considering how far the ledger lines go...guess you'll have to count... i can probly do this for other songs from either Eva or any other anime if you want...(im a music student, so this is what i do now) i can also switch it to any key you desire...

[]:             Quote Post by alexprevity » Wed Dec 26, 2012 4:31 am If you're interested, I just finished making the sheet music (and MIDI too) for the piano version of Instabilité (2EM17_KK_A08). Here are the links to download the files! My apologies if the sheet music arrangement is messy; I promise the MIDI is spot on. https://dl.dropbox.com/u/24684265/Instabilite.pdf https://dl.dropbox.com/u/24684265/Instabilite.mid
